name: cultural_heritage_school_district_s_new_redwood_jus_mer
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Cultural Heritage, the situation tagged internally around cultural heritage school district new redwood jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Jonah Chandra
agents.identity: I am Jonah Chandra, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Cultural Heritage. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Hughes
agents.identity: I am Talia Hughes, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Cultural Heritage. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of mercy.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of justice even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Jonah Chandra must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Jonah Chandra do?
